title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.010 - Proceedings upon information, how conducted
text:
546.010.  Proceedings upon information, how conducted. — The trial and all proceedings upon any information filed in a court of record shall be governed by the law and practice applicable to trials upon indictments in said court.
(RSMo 1939 § 3899) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3509, 1919 § 3854; 1909 § 5062
